Opportunity Cost
▪ 	Dean Graziosi - What do you have to give up, in order to
make time/space for something new?
▪ 	As you become successful, deal flow increases
▪ 	Being aware of opportunity costs becomes increasingly
more important - develop the ability to say no

-- 4 of 8 --

The Value of a Focus Day
▪ 	Dan Sullivan 101
▪ 	Free days - nothing business related
▪ 	Buffer days - nitty gritty business tasks
▪ 	Focus days - when you’re doing nothing but your
genius work
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 8 --

The Value of a Focus Day
▪ 	What’s the value of an entire day spent on focused work?
▪ 	Calculate it:
▪ 	Total days in a year - minus free days (weekends/
vacations)
▪ 	Minus realistic # of buffer days = days left for focus
days
▪ 	Take your income and divide it by the # of focus days -
and you can calculate the value of a focus day
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
